Class ExtendedIdentifier

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.Identifier
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.ExtendedIdentifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, ProgramElement, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, ModelElement
public class ExtendedIdentifier extends Identifier
an extended identifier that accepts hash symbols in its name but not as first character

  • Method Details

    • setText

      public void setText(String text)
      Description copied from class: Identifier
      Set text. The text becomes internalized such that x.getText().equals(y.getText()) is equivalent to x.getText()==y.getText() except for null Strings.
      Overrides:
      setText in class Identifier
      Parameters:
      text - a string.
